findings.title: URL uses raw IP address
findings.description: URL points to IP address 15.134.225.19 instead of a domain name

findings.title: Plain HTTP URL in execution context
findings.description: URL 'http://15.134.225.19/api/health' uses unencrypted HTTP and is being passed to a command that downloads or executes content. An attacker on the network could modify the content.
